name: courses_get_by_slug
description: Look up a specific course using its URL slug identifier.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Must be set to 'slug' to look up by slug.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: The URL slug of the course.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include.

elements.name: Machine Learning
elements.description: This course provides a broad introduction to machine learning...
